rules.name: Command Protocols
rules.effect: While a NECRONS CHARACTER model is leading this unit, each time a model in this unit makes an attack, add 1 to the Hit roll.

stratagems.name: Protocol of the Eternal Revenant
stratagems.timing: Any phase.
stratagems.cond: One NECRONS INFANTRY CHARACTER model from your army that was just destroyed. You can use this Stratagem on that model even though it was just destroyed.
stratagems.effect: At the end of the phase, set your model back up on the battlefield as close as possible to where it was destroyed and not within Engagement Range of any enemy units, with half of its starting number of wounds remaining.
stratagems.summary: Set destroyed model back up near where destroyed, not within Engagement Range of enemies, with half starting wounds

stratagems.name: Protocol of the Undying Legions
stratagems.timing: Your opponent’s Shooting phase or the Fight phase, just after an enemy unit has resolved its attacks.
stratagems.cond: One NECRONS unit from your army that had one or more of its models destroyed as a result of the attacking unit’s attacks.
stratagems.effect: Your unit activates its Reanimation Protocols and reanimates D3 wounds (or D3+1 wounds if a NECRONS CHARACTER is leading your unit].
stratagems.summary: Reanimate D3 wounds (D3+1 if led by NECRONS CHARACTER)

stratagems.name: Protocol of the Hungry Void
stratagems.timing: Fight phase.
stratagems.cond: One NECRONS unit from your army that has not been selected to fight this phase.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, add 1 to the Strength characteristic of melee weapons equipped by models in your unit. In addition, If a NECRONS CHARACTER is leading your unit, until the end of the phase, improve the Armour Penetration characteristic of melee weapons equipped by models in your unit by 1. (this is not cumulative with any other modifiers that improve Armour Penetration].
stratagems.summary: +1 Strength to melee weapons; if NECRONS CHARACTER leads unit, also +1 AP to melee weapons

stratagems.name: Protocol of the Sudden Storm
stratagems.timing: Your Movement phase.
stratagems.cond: One NECRONS unit from your army.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the turn, ranged weapons equipped by models in your unit have the [ASSAULT] ability. In addition, if a NECRONS CHARACTER is leading your unit, until the end of the phase, you can re-roll Advance rolls made for your unit.
stratagems.summary: Grant [ASSAULT] to unit's ranged weapons; if NECRONS CHARACTER leads unit, re-roll Advance rolls

stratagems.name: Protocol of the Conquering Tyrant
stratagems.timing: Your Shooting phase.
stratagems.cond: One NECRONS unit from your army that has not been selected to shoot this phase.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, each time a model in your unit makes an attack that targets a unit within half range, re-roll a Hit roll of 1. If a NECRONS CHARACTER is leading your unit, until the end of the phase, you can re-roll the Hit roll for that attack instead.
stratagems.summary: Re-roll Hit rolls of 1 at half range; if NECRONS CHARACTER leads unit, re-roll any Hit roll instead

stratagems.name: Protocol of the Vengeful Stars
stratagems.timing: Your opponent’s Shooting phase, just after an enemy unit destroys a NECRONS unit from your army.
stratagems.cond: One NECRONS CHARACTER unit from your army that was within 6" of that NECRONS unit when it was destroyed.
stratagems.effect: After the attacking unit has resolved its attacks, your unit can shoot as if it were your Shooting phase, but it must target only that enemy unit when doing so, and can only do so if that enemy unit is an eligible target.
stratagems.summary: Unit shoots back after being attacked; must target attacking unit only

stratagems.name: Protocol of the Undying Legions
stratagems.timing: Your opponent’s Shooting phase or the Fight phase, just after an enemy unit has resolved its attacks.
stratagems.cond: One NECRONS unit from your army that had one or more of its models destroyed as a result of the attacking unit’s attacks.
stratagems.effect: Your unit activates its Reanimation Protocols and reanimates D3 wounds (or D3+1 wounds if a NECRONS CHARACTER is leading your unit].
stratagems.summary: Reanimate D3 wounds (D3+1 if led by NECRONS CHARACTER)

stratagems.name: Protocol of the Conquering Tyrant
stratagems.timing: Your Shooting phase.
stratagems.cond: One NECRONS unit from your army that has not been selected to shoot this phase.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, each time a model in your unit makes an attack that targets a unit within half range, re-roll a Hit roll of 1. If a NECRONS CHARACTER is leading your unit, until the end of the phase, you can re-roll the Hit roll for that attack instead.
stratagems.summary: Re-roll Hit rolls of 1 at half range; if NECRONS CHARACTER leads unit, re-roll any Hit roll instead

enhancements.name: Veil of Darkness
enhancements.effect: NECRONS model only. Once per battle, at the end of your opponent’s turn, if the bearer’s unit is not within Engagement Range of any enemy units, the bearer can use this Enhancement. If it does, remove that unit from the battlefield. Then, in the Reinforcements step of your next Movement phase, set up that unit anywhere on the battlefield that is more than 9" horizontally away from all enemy models.

enhancements.name: Nether-realm Casket
enhancements.effect: NECRONS model only. While the bearer is leading a unit, models in that unit have the Stealth ability.

enhancements.name: Phasal Subjugator (Aura)
enhancements.effect: NECRONS model only. While a friendly NECRONS unit (excluding CHARACTER units) is within 6" of the bearer, each time a model in that unit makes an attack, add 1 to the Hit roll.

enhancements.name: Enaegic Dermal Bond
enhancements.effect: NECRONS model only. The bearer has the Feel No Pain 4+ ability.

rules.name: Annihilation Protocol
rules.effect:
Each time a DESTROYER CULT or FLAYED ONES unit from your army declares a charge, you can re-roll the Charge roll. If one or more targets of that charge are Below Half-strength, add 1 to the charge roll as well.
Each time a DESTROYER CULT unit from your army makes a ranged attack that targets the closest eligible target, add 1 to the Armour Penetration characteristic of that attack.

stratagems.name: Masks of Death
stratagems.timing: Your opponent’s Shooting phase or the Fight phase, just after an enemy unit has selected its targets.
stratagems.cond: One DESTROYER CULT or FLAYED ONES unit from your army that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking unit’s attacks.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, each time an attack targets your unit, subtract 1 from the Hit roll.
stratagems.summary: -1 to Hit rolls on all incoming attacks

stratagems.name: The Spoor of Frailty
stratagems.timing: Your Shooting phase or the Fight phase.
stratagems.cond: One DESTROYER CULT or FLAYED ONES unit from your army that has not been selected to shoot or fight this phase.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, each time a model from your unit makes an attack that targets a unit below Starting Strength, add 1 to the Hit roll. If the target is Below Half-strength, add 1 to the Wound roll as well.
stratagems.summary: +1 Hit vs units below Starting Strength; +1 Wound if below Half-strength

stratagems.name: Murderous Reanimation
stratagems.timing: Fight phase.
stratagems.cond: One DESTROYER CULT or FLAYED ONES unit from your army that has just destroyed an enemy unit, or just caused an enemy unit that was not Below Half-strength to become Below Half-strength.
stratagems.effect: Your unit’s Reanimation Protocols activate.
stratagems.summary: Activate Reanimation Protocols

stratagems.name: Pitiless Hunters
stratagems.timing: Fight phase.
stratagems.cond: One DESTROYER CULT or FLAYED ONES unit from your army that has not been selected to fight this phase.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, each time a model in your unit makes a Pile-in or Consolidation move, it can move up to 6" instead of up to 3".
stratagems.summary: Pile-in and Consolidation moves up to 6" instead of 3"

stratagems.name: Blood-fuelled Cruelty
stratagems.timing: Your opponent’s Movement phase, just after an enemy unit ends a Fall Back move.
stratagems.cond: One DESTROYER CULT or FLAYED ONES unit from your army that started the phase within Engagement Range of that enemy unit.
stratagems.effect: Roll one D6: on a 2-5, that enemy unit suffers D3 mortal wounds; on a 6, that enemy unit suffers 3 mortal wounds. Your unit can then make a Normal move, but must end that move as close as possible to that enemy unit.
stratagems.summary: Roll D6: 2-5 = D3 mortal wounds, 6 = 3 mortal wounds. Unit makes Normal move, must end closest possible to that enemy unit

stratagems.name: Insanity’s Ire
stratagems.timing: Your opponent’s Shooting phase, just after an enemy unit has shot.
stratagems.cond: One DESTROYER CULT or FLAYED ONES unit from your army that had one or more of its models destroyed by the attacking unit’s attacks.
stratagems.effect: Your unit can make a Normal move, but must end that move as close as possible to that enemy unit.
stratagems.summary: Normal move towards enemy unit, must end as close as possible

enhancements.name: Eternal Madness
enhancements.effect: NECRONS model only. In the Fight phase, each time a model in the bearer’s unit is destroyed, if that model has not fought this phase, roll one D6: on a 4+, do not remove the destroyed model from play; it can fight after the attacking models unit has finished making its attacks, and is then removed from play.

enhancements.name: Ingrained Superiority
enhancements.effect: NECRONS model only. Each time a model in the bearer’s unit makes an attack, on a Critical Wound, improve the Armour Penetration characteristic of that attack by 1.

enhancements.name: Soulless Reaper
enhancements.effect: DESTROYER CULT model only. Each time an enemy unit within Engagement Range of the bearer’s unit is selected to Fall Back, roll one D6: on a 3+, that unit cannot Fall Back this phase and must Remain Stationary.

enhancements.name: Eldritch Nightmare
enhancements.effect: DESTROYER CULT model only. At the start of the Fight phase, each enemy unit within Engagement Range of the bearer must take a Battle-shock test.

rules.name: Power Matrix
rules.effect:
Certain areas of the battlefield are considered to be within your army's Power Matrix, as follows:
- Your deployment zone is always within your army's Power Matrix.
- At the start of any phase, if you control at least half of the objective markers within No Man's Land, until the end of that phase, No Man's Land is within your army's Power Matrix.
- At the start of any phase, if you control at least half of the objective markers within your opponent's deployment zone, until the end of that phase, your opponent's deployment zone is within your army's Power Matrix.
Each time a model in a CRYPTEK or CANOPTEK unit from your army makes an attack, re-roll a Hit roll of 1. If such a unit is wholly within your Power Matrix, you can re-roll the Hit roll instead.

stratagems.name: Curse of the Cryptek
stratagems.timing: Your opponent’s Shooting phase or the Fight phase, just after an enemy unit has shot or fought.
stratagems.cond: One CRYPTEK model from your army that was destroyed by one of the attacking unit’s attacks. You can use this Stratagem on that model even though it was just destroyed.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the battle, each time a friendly CANOPTEK model makes an attack that targets the attacking unit, add 1 to the Hit roll and add 1 to the Wound roll.
stratagems.summary: CANOPTEK attacks: +1 Hit, +1 Wound until end of battle

stratagems.name: Cynosure of Eradication
stratagems.timing: The start of your Shooting phase or the start of the Fight phase.
stratagems.cond: One CRYPTEK or CANOPTEK unit from your army that is wholly within your army’s Power Matrix.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, weapons equipped by CRYPTEK or CANOPTEK models in your unit have the [DEVASTATING WOUNDS] ability.
stratagems.summary: Grant [DEVASTATING WOUNDS] to CRYPTEK and CANOPTEK weapons

stratagems.name: Solar Pulse
stratagems.timing: Start of your Shooting phase.
stratagems.cond: One CRYPTEK model from your army.
stratagems.effect: Select one objective marker within 18" of your CRYPTEK model. Until the end of the phase, weapons equipped by friendly NECRONS models have the [IGNORES COVER] ability while targeting units within range of that objective marker.
stratagems.summary: Friendly NECRONS gain [IGNORES COVER] vs units within 18" of selected objective marker

stratagems.name: Reactive Subroutines
stratagems.timing: Your opponent’s Movement phase, just after an enemy unit ends a Normal, Advance or Fall Back move.
stratagems.cond: One CANOPTEK unit from your army that is within 9" of that enemy unit.
stratagems.effect: Your unit can make a Normal move of up to 6".
stratagems.summary: Unit makes Normal move up to 6"

stratagems.name: Countertemporal Shift
stratagems.timing: Your opponent’s Shooting phase, just after an enemy unit has selected its targets.
stratagems.cond: One CANOPTEK unit from your army that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking unit’s attacks.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, your unit can only be selected as the target of a ranged attack if the attacking model is within 18".
stratagems.summary: Enemy ranged attacks only effective within 18"

stratagems.name: Suboptimal Facade
stratagems.timing: Your opponent’s Charge phase, just after an enemy unit has declared a charge.
stratagems.cond: One CANOPTEK unit from your army that was selected as a target of that charge and is wholly within your army’s Power Matrix.
stratagems.effect: Your unit’s Reanimation Protocols activate.
stratagems.summary: Activate Reanimation Protocols

stratagems.name: Reactive Subroutines
stratagems.timing: Your opponent’s Movement phase, just after an enemy unit ends a Normal, Advance or Fall Back move.
stratagems.cond: One CANOPTEK unit from your army that is within 9" of that enemy unit.
stratagems.effect: Your unit can make a Normal move of up to 6".
stratagems.summary: Unit makes Normal move up to 6"

enhancements.name: Dimensional Sanctum
enhancements.effect: CRYPTEK model only. Models in the bearer’s unit have the Infiltrators ability.

enhancements.name: Hyperphasic Fulcrum
enhancements.effect: CRYPTEK model only. While the bearer is leading a unit, if that unit is wholly within your army’s Power Matrix, each time a model in that unit makes an attack, re-roll a Wound roll of 1.

enhancements.name: Autodivinator
enhancements.effect: CRYPTEK model only. Each time your opponent gains a CP as the result of an ability, roll one D6: on a 2+, you also gain 1CP.

enhancements.name: Metalodermal Tesla Weave
enhancements.effect: CRYPTEK model only. Once per phase, when an enemy unit selects the bearer’s unit as a target of a charge, roll one D6: on a 2-5, that enemy unit suffers D3 mortal wounds; on a 6, that enemy unit suffers 3 mortal wounds.

rules.name: Worthy Foes
rules.effect: In your Command phase, select one enemy unit. Until the start of your next Command phase, each time an NOBLE, LYCHGUARD or TRIARCH unit from your army makes an attack against that unit, add 1 to the Wound roll.

stratagems.name: Your Time Is Nigh
stratagems.timing: Any phase, just after your opponent’s WARLORD is destroyed.
stratagems.cond: Your NECRONS WARLORD.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the battle, each time an enemy unit takes a Battle-shock or Leadership test, subtract 1 from the result.
stratagems.summary: -1 to enemy Battle-shock and Leadership tests until end of battle

stratagems.name: Enslaved Artifice
stratagems.timing: Your Shooting phase or the Fight phase.
stratagems.cond: One NECRONS unit from your army (excluding TITANIC units) that has not been selected to shoot or fight this phase.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, each time a model in your unit makes an attack, an unmodified Hit roll of 5+ scores a Critical Hit.
stratagems.summary: Grant [CRITICAL HITS] on unmodified 5+ to unit's attacks

stratagems.name: Nanoassembly Protocols
stratagems.timing: Your opponent’s Shooting phase or the Fight phase, just after an enemy unit has selected its targets.
stratagems.cond: One NECRONS VEHICLE unit from your army that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking unit’s attacks.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, each time an attack is allocated to a model in your unit, subtract 1 from the Damage characteristic of that attack.
stratagems.summary: Subtract 1 from Damage of all incoming attacks

stratagems.name: Sentinels of Eternity
stratagems.timing: Fight phase, just after an enemy unit has selected its targets.
stratagems.cond: One LYCHGUARD or TRIARCH PRAETORIANS unit from your army that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking unit’s attacks.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, each time a model in your unit is destroyed, if that model has not fought this phase, roll one D6: on a 4+, do not remove it from play. The destroyed model can fight after the attacking model’s unit has finished making attacks, and is then removed from play.
stratagems.summary: Roll D6 when destroyed (4+): fight before removal if hasn't fought this phase

stratagems.name: Suffer No Rival
stratagems.timing: Fight phase.
stratagems.cond: One LYCHGUARD or TRIARCH unit from your army that has not been selected to fight this phase.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, melee weapons equipped by models in your unit have the [PRECISION] ability.
stratagems.summary: Grant [PRECISION] to unit's melee weapons

stratagems.name: Territorial Obsession
stratagems.timing: Your Command phase.
stratagems.cond: One LYCHGUARD or TRIARCH unit from your army.
stratagems.effect: Until the start of your next Command phase, add 1 to the Objective Control characteristic of models in your unit. If your unit has the VEHICLE keyword, add 3 to the Objective Control characteristic instead.
stratagems.summary: +1 OC (VEHICLE units: +3 OC) until next Command phase

enhancements.name: Honourable Combatant
enhancements.effect: OVERLORD model only. Each time the bearer’s unit destroys an enemy CHARACTER unit, your opponent loses 1CP if they have any.

enhancements.name: Unflinching Will
enhancements.effect: OVERLORD model only. The bearer’s melee weapons have the [PRECISION] and [ANTI-INFANTRY 5+] abilities.

enhancements.name: Warrior Noble
enhancements.effect: OVERLORD model only. Each time a melee attack targets the bearer’s unit, subtract 1 from the Hit roll.

enhancements.name: Eternal Conqueror
enhancements.effect: OVERLORD model only. Each time a model in the bearer’s unit makes an attack that targets an enemy unit within range of an objective marker, you can re-roll the Hit roll.

rules.name: Hyperphasing
rules.effect:
At the end of your opponent's turn, you can select a number of NECRONS units from your army (excluding units that are within Engagement Range of one or more enemy units). The maximum number of units you can select depends on the battle size, as follows:
Incursion - Up to 1 unit.
Strike Force - Up to 2 units
Onslaught - Up to 3 units
Once you have made your selection, remove those units from the battlefield and place them into Strategic Reserves.

stratagems.name: Hyperphasic Recall
stratagems.timing: Your opponent’s Shooting phase or the Fight phase, just after an enemy unit has shot or fought.
stratagems.cond: One NECRONS INFANTRY unit from your army that had one or more of its models destroyed as a result of the attacking unit’s attacks and one friendly MONOLITH model.
stratagems.effect: Remove your INFANTRY unit from the battlefield and then set it back up anywhere on the battlefield that is wholly within 6" of your MONOLITH model and not within Engagement Range of one or more enemy units.
stratagems.summary: Remove INFANTRY unit from battlefield; redeploy wholly within 6" of your MONOLITH, not in Engagement Range of enemies

stratagems.name: Quantum Deflection
stratagems.timing: Your opponent’s Shooting phase or the Fight phase, just after an enemy unit has selected its targets.
stratagems.cond: One NECRONS VEHICLE unit from your army that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking unit’s attacks.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, models in your unit have a 4+ invulnerable save.
stratagems.summary: Grant 4+ invulnerable save to unit

stratagems.name: Reanimation Crypts
stratagems.timing: Your Command phase.
stratagems.cond: Your NECRONS WARLORD.
stratagems.effect: For each of your NECRONS units in Reserves, that Reserves unit’s Reanimation Protocols activate.
stratagems.summary: Activate Reanimation Protocols for each NECRONS unit in Reserves

stratagems.name: Cosmic Precision
stratagems.timing: Your Movement phase.
stratagems.cond: One NECRONS unit from your army (excluding MONSTER units) that is arriving using the Deep Strike or Hyperphasing abilities this phase.
stratagems.effect: Your unit can be set up anywhere on the battlefield that is more than 6" horizontally away from all enemy models.
stratagems.summary: Set up unit anywhere more than 6" from enemies

stratagems.name: Dimensional Corridor
stratagems.timing: Your Charge phase.
stratagems.cond: One NECRONS unit from your army that was set up on the battlefield this turn using the Eternity Gate ability of a MONOLITH model that started the turn on the battlefield.
stratagems.effect: Your unit is eligible to charge this phase.
stratagems.summary: Your unit is eligible to charge this phase

stratagems.name: Entropic Damping
stratagems.timing: Your opponent’s Shooting phase, just after an enemy unit has selected its targets.
stratagems.cond: One TITANIC model from your army that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking unit’s attacks and is within 18" of the attacking unit.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, weapons equipped by models in the attacking unit have the [HAZARDOUS] ability.
stratagems.summary: Grant [HAZARDOUS] to attacking unit's weapons

stratagems.name: Cosmic Precision
stratagems.timing: Your Movement phase.
stratagems.cond: One NECRONS unit from your army (excluding MONSTER units) that is arriving using the Deep Strike or Hyperphasing abilities this phase.
stratagems.effect: Your unit can be set up anywhere on the battlefield that is more than 6" horizontally away from all enemy models.
stratagems.summary: Set up unit anywhere more than 6" from enemies

enhancements.name: Dimensional Overseer
enhancements.effect: NECRONS model only. While the bearer is on the battlefield or in Strategic Reserves, add one to the number of units from your army that you can select for the Hyperphasing rule.

enhancements.name: Arisen Tyrant
enhancements.effect: NECRONS model only. Each time a model in the bearer’s unit makes an attack, re-roll a Hit roll of 1. If the bearer’s unit was set up on the battlefield this turn, you can re-roll the Hit roll instead.

enhancements.name: Hyperspatial Transfer Node
enhancements.effect: NECRONS model only. Each time the bearer’s unit Advances, do not make an Advance roll for it. Instead, until the end of the phase, add 6" to the Move characteristic of models in the bearer’s unit.

enhancements.name: Osteoclave Fulcrum
enhancements.effect: NECRONS model only. Models in the bearer’s unit have the Deep Strike ability.

rules.name: Relentless Onslaught
rules.effect: Each time a NECRONS model from your army makes an attack that targets a unit within range of one or more objective markers, add 1 to the Hit roll. In addition, ranged weapons equipped by NECRONS VEHICLE and NECRONS MOUNTED models (excluding TITANIC models) from your army have the [ASSAULT] ability.

stratagems.name: Merciless Reclamation
stratagems.timing: Your Shooting phase or the Fight phase.
stratagems.cond: One NECRONS unit (excluding MONSTER and TITANIC units) from your army that has not been selected to shoot or fight this phase.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, each time a model in your unit makes an attack, if the target of that attack is within range of one or more objective markers, add 1 to the Wound roll.
stratagems.summary: +1 to Wound rolls vs targets within range of objective markers

stratagems.name: Unyielding Forms
stratagems.timing: Your opponent’s Shooting phase or the Fight phase, just after an enemy unit has selected its targets.
stratagems.cond: One NECRONS VEHICLE or NECRONS MOUNTED unit (excluding TITANIC units) from your army that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking unit’s attacks.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, each time an attack targets a model in your unit, if the Strength characteristic of that attack is greater than the Toughness characteristic of that unit, subtract 1 from the Wound roll.
stratagems.summary: -1 to Wound rolls if attacker's Strength exceeds unit's Toughness

stratagems.name: Chronoshift
stratagems.timing: Your Movement phase.
stratagems.cond: One NECRONS VEHICLE or NECRONS MOUNTED unit (excluding TITANIC units) from your army that has not been selected to move this phase.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, if your unit Advances, do not make an Advance roll for it. Instead, until the end of the phase, add 6" to the Move characteristic of models in your unit.
stratagems.summary: Advancing: +6" Move instead of Advance roll

stratagems.name: Dimensional Tunnel
stratagems.timing: Your Movement phase.
stratagems.cond: One NECRONS VEHICLE or NECRONS MOUNTED unit (excluding TITANIC units) from your army.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, models in your unit can move horizontally through models and terrain features.
stratagems.summary: Models move horizontally through enemies and terrain

stratagems.name: Endless Servitude
stratagems.timing: End of your Fight phase.
stratagems.cond: One NECRONS unit (excluding MONSTER and TITANIC units) from your army that is within range of one or more objective markers you control.
stratagems.effect: Your unit’s Reanimation Protocols activate.
stratagems.summary: Activate Reanimation Protocols

stratagems.name: Reactive Reposition
stratagems.timing: Your opponent’s Shooting phase, just after an enemy unit has shot.
stratagems.cond: One NECRONS unit from your army (excluding MONSTER and TITANIC units) that was the target of one or more of the attacking unit’s attacks.
stratagems.effect: Your unit can make a Normal move of up to D6".
stratagems.summary: Make a Normal move of up to D6"

enhancements.name: Dread Majesty (Aura)
enhancements.effect: OVERLORD or CATACOMB COMMAND BARGE model only. While a friendly NECRONS unit (excluding MONSTER and TITANIC units) is within 6" of the bearer, each time a model in that unit makes an attack, re-roll a Hit roll of 1 and re-roll a Wound roll of 1.

enhancements.name: Miniaturised Nebuloscope
enhancements.effect: NECRONS model only. Ranged weapons equipped by models in the bearer’s unit have the [IGNORES COVER] ability.

enhancements.name: Demanding Leader
enhancements.effect: NECRONS model only. In your Command phase, select one friendly NECRONS VEHICLE or NECRONS MOUNTED unit (excluding TITANIC units) within 6" of the bearer. Until the start of your next Command phase, that unit is eligible to shoot in a turn in which it Fell Back.

enhancements.name: Chrono-impedance Fields
enhancements.effect: NECRONS model only. In your Command phase, select one friendly NECRONS VEHICLE or NECRONS MOUNTED unit (excluding TITANIC units) within 6" of the bearer. Until the start of your next Command phase, each time an attack is allocated to a model in that unit, subtract 1 from the Damage characteristic of that attack.

rules.name: Technosorcerous Augmentations
rules.effect:
- Ranged weapons equipped by ^^**Cryptek^^** models from your army have the [ASSAULT] ability.
- In your Shooting phase, each time a ^^**Cryptek^^** unit from your army is selected to shoot, select one of the following abilities: [ANTI‑INFANTRY 3+], [ANTI‑MOUNTED 4+], [ASSAULT], [HEAVY], [IGNORES COVER]. Until the end of the phase, ranged weapons equipped by models in that unit have that ability

stratagems.name: Molecular Targeting
stratagems.timing: Your Shooting phase or the Fight phase.
stratagems.cond: One NECRONS unit from your army that has not been selected to shoot or fight this phase.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, each time a model in your unit makes an attack, you can ignore any or all modifiers to the following: that attack’s Ballistic Skill or Weapon Skill characteristic; the Hit roll. If your unit has the CRYPTEK keyword, you can also ignore any or all modifiers to the Wound roll.
stratagems.summary: Ignore modifiers to BS/WS and Hit rolls; also ignore Wound roll modifiers if CRYPTEK

stratagems.name: Microscarab Swarm
stratagems.timing: Your opponent’s Shooting phase or the Fight phase, just after an enemy unit has selected its targets.
stratagems.cond: One CRYPTEK INFANTRY unit from your army that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking unit’s attacks.
stratagems.effect: If your unit has the NECRON WARRIORS keyword, until the end of the phase, models in your unit have a 5+ invulnerable save. If your unit has the IMMORTALS keyword, until the end of the phase, models in your unit have a 4+ invulnerable save.
stratagems.summary: NECRON WARRIORS: 5+ invulnerable save; IMMORTALS: 4+ invulnerable save until end of phase

stratagems.name: Animus Curse
stratagems.timing: Your opponent’s Shooting phase or the Fight phase, just after an enemy unit has shot or fought.
stratagems.cond: One CRYPTEK model from your army that was destroyed by one of the attacking unit’s attacks. You can use this Stratagem on that model even though it was just destroyed.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the battle, each time a friendly NECRONS model makes an attack that targets the attacking unit, you can re-roll the Hit roll.
stratagems.summary: Re-roll Hit rolls for friendly NECRONS attacks against the attacking unit

stratagems.name: Synergistic Empowerment
stratagems.timing: Start of your Shooting phase.
stratagems.cond: One CRYPTEK unit from your army.
stratagems.effect: Select one friendly NECRONS model (excluding MONSTERS and VEHICLES) within 12" of a CRYPTEK model in your unit. Until the end of the phase, that friendly NECRONS model has the CRYPTEK keyword.
stratagems.summary: Selected NECRONS model gains CRYPTEK keyword until end of phase

stratagems.name: Untapped Power
stratagems.timing: Your Shooting phase.
stratagems.cond: One CRYPTEK unit from your army that has not been selected to shoot this phase.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, each time your unit is selected to shoot, when selecting an ability for the Technosorcerous Augmentations Detachment Rule, you can select one additional ability from those available.
stratagems.summary: Select +1 additional Technosorcerous Augmentation ability when unit shoots

stratagems.name: Potentiality Syphon
stratagems.timing: Your opponent’s Command phase.
stratagems.cond: One NECRONS unit from your army within range of one or more objective markers.
stratagems.effect: Your unit’s Reanimation Protocols activate. If it is a CRYPTEK unit, it reanimates an additional 1 wound.
stratagems.summary: Unit's Reanimation Protocols activate; CRYPTEK units reanimate +1 wound

enhancements.name: Quantum Abacus
enhancements.effect: NECRONS model only. Each time you select the bearer’s unit as the target of a Stratagem, roll one D6, adding 1 if it is within range of one or more objectives: on a 4+, you gain 1CP.

enhancements.name: Atomic Disintegrators
enhancements.effect: CRYPTEK model only. In your Shooting phase, each time the bearer’s unit is selected to shoot, when selecting an ability for the Technosorcerous Augmentations Detachment rule, you can also select from the following abilities: [ANTI-MONSTER 5+], [ANTI-VEHICLE 5+].

enhancements.name: Gauntlet of Compression
enhancements.effect: NECRONS model only. Add 6" to the Range characteristic of ranged weapons equipped by models in the bearer’s unit.

enhancements.name: Gravitic Bolas
enhancements.effect: CRYPTEK model only. In your Shooting phase, after the bearer has shot, select one enemy unit hit by one or more of those attacks (excluding TITANIC units); until the start of your next turn, that enemy unit is pinned. While a unit is pinned, subtract 2 from that unit’s Move characteristic and subtract 2 from Charge rolls made for that unit.

rules.name: Cold Fervour
rules.effect:
- Add 2 to the Strength characteristic of weapons equipped by ^^**Destroyer Cult^^** models from your army. 
- The first time each turn that a ^^**Destroyer Cult^^** unit from your army makes attacks that destroy a unit or cause it to become Below Half‑strength, after that unit has finished resolving its attacks, until the end of the turn, add 2 to the Strength characteristic of weapons equipped by friendly ^^**Necrons^^** models (excluding ^^**Destroyer Cult, Monster^^** and ^^**Titanic^^** models).

stratagems.name: Methodical Murder
stratagems.timing: Your Shooting phase or the Fight phase.
stratagems.cond: One NECRONS unit (excluding MONSTERS and VEHICLES) from your army that has not been selected to shoot or fight this phase.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, weapons equipped by models in your unit have the [SUSTAINED HITS 1] ability.
stratagems.summary: Grant [SUSTAINED HITS 1] to unit's weapons

stratagems.name: Image of Death
stratagems.timing: Your opponent’s Shooting phase or the Fight phase, just after an enemy unit has selected its targets.
stratagems.cond: One DESTROYER CULT unit from your army that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking unit’s attacks.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, each time an attack targets your unit, subtract 1 from the Hit roll.
stratagems.summary: -1 to Hit rolls on all incoming attacks

stratagems.name: Mortis Protocols
stratagems.timing: Your Shooting phase or the Fight phase, just after the first time a DESTROYER CULT unit from your army destroys an enemy unit this turn.
stratagems.cond: One friendly NECRONS unit (excluding MONSTERS and VEHICLES) within 9" of that DESTROYER CULT unit.
stratagems.effect: The friendly unit’s Reanimation Protocols activate.
stratagems.summary: Activate Reanimation Protocols

stratagems.name: Driven to Butchery
stratagems.timing: Your Shooting phase or your Charge phase.
stratagems.cond: One DESTROYER CULT unit from your army.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the turn, your unit is eligible to shoot and declare a charge in a turn in which it Advanced.
stratagems.summary: Unit that Advanced this turn can shoot and declare charges

stratagems.name: Spreading Madness
stratagems.timing: Your Charge phase.
stratagems.cond: One NECRONS unit (excluding MONSTERS and VEHICLES) from your army that has not declared a charge this phase.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, each time your unit declares a charge, if one or more targets of that charge are within Engagement Range of one or more friendly units, add 2 to the Charge roll.
stratagems.summary: +2 to Charge roll if target within Engagement Range of friendly unit

stratagems.name: Unnatural Aggression
stratagems.timing: End of your opponent’s Charge phase.
stratagems.cond: One NECRONS unit (excluding MONSTERS and VEHICLES) from your army that is within 6" of one or more enemy units and would be eligible to declare a charge against one or more of those enemy units if it were your Charge phase.
stratagems.effect: Your unit now declares a charge that only targets one or more of those enemy units, and you resolve that charge. Note that even if this charge is successful, your unit does not receive any Charge bonus this turn.
stratagems.summary: Declare charge against selected enemies; no Charge bonus this turn

enhancements.name: Destroyer Ankh
enhancements.effect: CATACOMB COMMAND BARGE or OVERLORD model only. The bearer has the DESTROYER CULT keyword. Add 2" to the Move characteristic of models in the bearer’s unit and add 2 to the Attacks characteristic of melee weapons equipped by the bearer.

enhancements.name: Murdermind
enhancements.effect: CRYPTEK model only. The bearer has the DESTROYER CULT keyword and during the Declare Battle Formations step, the bearer can be attached to a DESTROYER CULT unit (excluding CHARACTER units). If you do, the bearer’s unit cannot contain any models without the DESTROYER CULT keyword. Add 3" to the Move characteristic of the bearer.

enhancements.name: Mark of the Nekrosor
enhancements.effect: DESTROYER CULT model only. Each time a model in the bearer’s unit makes an attack, add 1 to the Hit roll.

enhancements.name: Cursed Circlet
enhancements.effect: DESTROYER CULT model only. Each time an enemy unit is selected to shoot, after that unit has shot, if any models from the bearer’s unit were destroyed as a result of those attacks, the bearer’s unit can make a Surge move. To do so, roll one D6: the bearer’s unit can be moved a number of inches up to the result, but the bearer’s unit must finish that move as close as possible to the closest enemy unit (excluding AIRCRAFT). When doing so, those models can be moved within Engagement Range of that enemy unit. A unit cannot make a Surge move while it is Battle-shocked.

rules.name: Cosmic Distortion
rules.effect:
^^**Necrons Monster^^** units from your army have the following ability: 

Distortion Fields (Aura): While an enemy unit is within 6" of this unit, it is unravelling. While an enemy unit is unravelling, each time an attack targets that unit, improve the Armour Penetration characteristic of that attack by 1. 
At the start of each phase, for each ^^**Necrons Monster^^** unit from your army, that unit can suffer 3 mortal wounds. If it does, until the end of the phase, the range of that unit’s Distortion Fields Aura ability is increased to 9".

Restrictions

When mustering your army, each ^^**Necrons Monster^^** unit from your army has the relevant Necrodermal Binding ability shown on the right, and you must increase the points cost of each of those units by the amount shown in the Munitorum Field Manual. If this causes your army to exceed the points limit for the battle you are playing, you cannot include that unit in your army.

stratagems.name: Disharmonisation Cascade
stratagems.timing: Any phase, just after a NECRONS MONSTER model from your army is destroyed, before making its Deadly Demise roll.
stratagems.cond: That NECRONS MONSTER model. You can use this Stratagem on that model even though it was just destroyed.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, your model’s Deadly Demise ability inflicts mortal wounds on a D6 roll of 3+ instead of on a 6.
stratagems.summary: Deadly Demise triggers on 3+ instead of 6

stratagems.name: Molecular Erosion
stratagems.timing: Command phase.
stratagems.cond: One NECRONS MONSTER unit from your army.
stratagems.effect: Select one unravelling enemy unit visible to your unit. That enemy unit must take a Battle-shock test. When doing so, subtract 1 from the result. If that test is failed, that enemy unit suffers D3+1 mortal wounds.
stratagems.summary: Select unravelling enemy unit; it takes Battle-shock test at -1; if failed, suffers D3+1 mortal wounds

stratagems.name: Mass Transmogrification
stratagems.timing: Your Shooting phase or the Fight phase, just after a NECRONS MONSTER unit from your army destroys an enemy unit.
stratagems.cond: One friendly NECRONS unit (excluding MONSTERS) within 6" of that MONSTER unit.
stratagems.effect: If that enemy unit was unravelling at the start of the phase, your friendly unit’s Reanimation Protocols activate.
stratagems.summary: Friendly unit gains Reanimation Protocols if target enemy unit was unravelling at phase start

stratagems.name: Entrophasic Aura Targeting
stratagems.timing: Your Shooting phase or the Fight phase.
stratagems.cond: One NECRONS unit (excluding MONSTERS) from your army that has not been selected to shoot or fight this phase.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, each time a model in your unit makes an attack that targets an enemy unit, re-roll a Hit roll of 1. If the target of that attack is unravelling, re-roll a Wound roll of 1 as well.
stratagems.summary: Re-roll Hit rolls of 1; re-roll Wound rolls of 1 against unravelling targets

stratagems.name: Chronodistortion
stratagems.timing: Fight phase, just after an enemy unit has selected its targets.
stratagems.cond: One NECRONS unit from your army that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking unit’s attacks.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, each time a model in your unit is destroyed, if that model has not fought this phase, roll one D6, adding 1 if the attacking unit is unravelling: on a 4+, do not remove the destroyed model from play; it can fight after the attacking unit has finished making its attacks, and is then removed from play.
stratagems.summary: Destroyed models not yet fought this phase: roll D6 (+1 if attacker unravelling); 4+ stays on field to fight, then removed

stratagems.name: Phase Melding
stratagems.timing: Your opponent’s Movement phase, when an unravelling enemy unit is selected to Fall Back.
stratagems.cond: One NECRONS unit from your army that is within Engagement Range of that enemy unit.
stratagems.effect: When that enemy unit Falls Back, all models in that enemy unit must take a Desperate Escape test. When doing so, if that enemy unit is Battle-shocked, subtract 1 from each of those tests.
stratagems.summary: Enemy unit takes Desperate Escape test when Fall Back; -1 if Battle-shocked

enhancements.name: Singularity Matrix
enhancements.effect: C’TAN SHARD OF THE DECEIVER model only. This model has the following ability: Lord of Deceit (Aura): Each time your opponent targets a unit from their army with a Stratagem, if that unit is within 12" of this model, increase the cost of that use of that Stratagem by 1CP.

enhancements.name: Quantum Goad
enhancements.effect: C’TAN SHARD OF THE NIGHTBRINGER model only. This model is eligible to declare a charge in a turn in which it Advanced.

enhancements.name: Animus Damper
enhancements.effect: C’TAN SHARD OF THE VOID DRAGON model only. Once per turn, at the start of your opponent’s Shooting phase, select one enemy VEHICLE unit visible to the bearer. That unit must take a Leadership test. Until the end of the phase, each time a model in that unit makes an attack, subtract 1 from the Hit roll and, if that Leadership test was failed, subtract 1 from the Wound roll as well.

enhancements.name: Reletavistic Tether
enhancements.effect: TRANSCENDENT C’TAN model only. In your turn, each time this model is set up on the battlefield using the Deep Strike or Transdimensional Displacement abilities, it can be set up anywhere on the battlefield that is more than 6" horizontally away from all enemy units. When doing so, if this model is set up within 9" of one or more enemy units, until the end of the turn, it is not eligible to declare a charge.

abilities.name: Invulnerable Save
abilities.effect: This model has a 4+ invulnerable save.

abilities.name: Leader
abilities.effect:
This model can be attached to the following units:
■ IMMORTALS
■ LYCHGUARD
■ NECRON WARRIORS

abilities.name: Grand Strategist
abilities.effect: At the start of your Command phase, if this model is on the battlefield, you gain 1CP.

abilities.name: Lord of the Storm
abilities.effect: Once per battle, at the end of your Command phase, this model can use this ability. If it does, roll one D6 for each enemy unit within 12" of this model: on a 2-5, that enemy unit suffers D3 mortal wounds; on a 6, that enemy unit suffers D3+3 mortal wounds.

abilities.name: Reanimation Protocols
abilities.effect:
If your Army Faction is NECRONS, at the end of your Command phase, each unit from your army with this ability that is on the battlefield activates its Reanimation Protocols and reanimates D3 wounds. Each time such a unit reanimates a wound:
■ If that unit contains one or more models with fewer than their starting number of wounds remaining, select one of those models; that model regains one lost wound.
■ If all models in that unit have their starting number of wounds, but that unit is not at its Starting Strength, one destroyed model is returned to that unit with one wound remaining.
Once such a unit is at its Starting Strength and all of its models have their starting number of wounds, nothing further happens.

abilities.name: Leader
abilities.effect:
While a Bodyguard unit contains a Leader, it is known as an Attached unit and, with the exception of rules that are triggered when units are destroyed (pg 12), it is treated as a single unit for all rules purposes. Each time an attack targets an Attached unit, until the attacking unit has resolved all of its attacks, you must use the Toughness characteristic of the Bodyguard models in that unit, even if a Leader in that unit has a different Toughness characteristic. Each time an attack successfully wounds an Attached unit, that attack cannot be allocated to a Character model in that unit, even if that Character model has lost one or more wounds or has already had attacks allocated to it this phase. As soon as the last Bodyguard model in an Attached unit has been destroyed, any attacks made against that unit that have yet to be allocated can then be allocated to Character models in that unit.

Each time the last model in a Bodyguard unit is destroyed, each CHARACTER unit that is part of that Attached unit becomes a separate unit, with its original Starting Strength. If this happens as the result of an attack, they become separate units after the attacking unit has resolved all of its attacks. 

Each time the last model in a CHARACTER unit that is attached to a Bodyguard unit is destroyed and there is not another CHARACTER unit attached, that Attached unit’s Bodyguard unit becomes a separate unit, with its original Starting Strength. If this happens as the result of an attack, they become separate units after the attacking unit has resolved all of its attacks. 

Each time a unit that is part of an Attached unit is destroyed, it does not have the keywords of any other units that make up that Attached unit (unless it has those keywords on its own datasheet) for the purposes of any rules that would be triggered when that unit is destroyed.

abilities.name: Annihilation Protocol
abilities.effect:
Each time a DESTROYER CULT or FLAYED ONES unit from your army declares a charge, you can re-roll the Charge roll. If one or more targets of that charge are Below Half-strength, add 1 to the charge roll as well.
Each time a DESTROYER CULT unit from your army makes a ranged attack that targets the closest eligible target, add 1 to the Armour Penetration characteristic of that attack.

abilities.name: Command Protocols
abilities.effect: While a NECRONS CHARACTER model is leading this unit, each time a model in this unit makes an attack, add 1 to the Hit roll.

abilities.name: Hyperphasing
abilities.effect:
At the end of your opponent's turn, you can select a number of NECRONS units from your army (excluding units that are within Engagement Range of one or more enemy units). The maximum number of units you can select depends on the battle size, as follows:
Incursion - Up to 1 unit.
Strike Force - Up to 2 units
Onslaught - Up to 3 units
Once you have made your selection, remove those units from the battlefield and place them into Strategic Reserves.

abilities.name: Power Matrix
abilities.effect:
Certain areas of the battlefield are considered to be within your army's Power Matrix, as follows:
- Your deployment zone is always within your army's Power Matrix.
- At the start of any phase, if you control at least half of the objective markers within No Man's Land, until the end of that phase, No Man's Land is within your army's Power Matrix.
- At the start of any phase, if you control at least half of the objective markers within your opponent's deployment zone, until the end of that phase, your opponent's deployment zone is within your army's Power Matrix.
Each time a model in a CRYPTEK or CANOPTEK unit from your army makes an attack, re-roll a Hit roll of 1. If such a unit is wholly within your Power Matrix, you can re-roll the Hit roll instead.

abilities.name: Worthy Foes
abilities.effect: In your Command phase, select one enemy unit. Until the start of your next Command phase, each time an NOBLE, LYCHGUARD or TRIARCH unit from your army makes an attack against that unit, add 1 to the Wound roll.

abilities.name: Technosorcerous Augmentations
abilities.effect:
- Ranged weapons equipped by ^^**Cryptek^^** models from your army have the [ASSAULT] ability.
- In your Shooting phase, each time a ^^**Cryptek^^** unit from your army is selected to shoot, select one of the following abilities: [ANTI‑INFANTRY 3+], [ANTI‑MOUNTED 4+], [ASSAULT], [HEAVY], [IGNORES COVER]. Until the end of the phase, ranged weapons equipped by models in that unit have that ability

abilities.name: Cold Fervour
abilities.effect:
- Add 2 to the Strength characteristic of weapons equipped by ^^**Destroyer Cult^^** models from your army. 
- The first time each turn that a ^^**Destroyer Cult^^** unit from your army makes attacks that destroy a unit or cause it to become Below Half‑strength, after that unit has finished resolving its attacks, until the end of the turn, add 2 to the Strength characteristic of weapons equipped by friendly ^^**Necrons^^** models (excluding ^^**Destroyer Cult, Monster^^** and ^^**Titanic^^** models).

Distortion Fields (Aura): While an enemy unit is within 6" of this unit, it is unravelling. While an enemy unit is unravelling, each time an attack targets that unit, improve the Armour Penetration characteristic of that attack by 1. 
At the start of each phase, for each ^^**Necrons Monster^^** unit from your army, that unit can suffer 3 mortal wounds. If it does, until the end of the phase, the range of that unit’s Distortion Fields Aura ability is increased to 9".

Restrictions

When mustering your army, each ^^**Necrons Monster^^** unit from your army has the relevant Necrodermal Binding ability shown on the right, and you must increase the points cost of each of those units by the amount shown in the Munitorum Field Manual. If this causes your army to exceed the points limit for the battle you are playing, you cannot include that unit in your army.

abilities.name: Master Chronomancer
abilities.effect: While this model is leading a unit, models in that unit have a 4+ invulnerable save.

abilities.name: Invulnerable Save
abilities.effect: This model has a 4+ invulnerable save.

abilities.name: The Stars Are Right
abilities.effect: Once per battle, at the start of the Fight phase, this model can use this ability. If it does, until the end of the phase, triple the Attacks and Strength characteristics of this model’s Staff of Tomorrow and every successful Wound roll made for this model’s attacks scores a Critical Wound.

abilities.name: Leader
abilities.effect:
This model can be attached to the following units:
■ IMMORTALS
■ NECRON WARRIORS
You can attach this model to one of the above units even if one ROYAL WARDEN or NOBLE model has already been attached to it. If you do, and that Bodyguard unit is destroyed, the Leader units attached to it become separate units, with their original Starting Strengths.

abilities.name: Lord of the Pyrrhian Eternals
abilities.effect: While this model is leading a unit, each time a model in that unit makes an attack, add 1 to the Wound roll.

abilities.name: Mind in the Machine
abilities.effect: At the start of your opponent’s Shooting phase, select one enemy VEHICLE unit within 12" of and visible to this model. That unit must take a Leadership test. If that test is passed, until the end of the phase, each time a model in that unit makes an attack, subtract 1 from the Hit roll; if that test is failed, that unit is not eligible to shoot this phase.

abilities.name: Annihilation Protocol
abilities.effect:
Each time a DESTROYER CULT or FLAYED ONES unit from your army declares a charge, you can re-roll the Charge roll. If one or more targets of that charge are Below Half-strength, add 1 to the charge roll as well.
Each time a DESTROYER CULT unit from your army makes a ranged attack that targets the closest eligible target, add 1 to the Armour Penetration characteristic of that attack.

abilities.name: Command Protocols
abilities.effect: While a NECRONS CHARACTER model is leading this unit, each time a model in this unit makes an attack, add 1 to the Hit roll.

abilities.name: Hyperphasing
abilities.effect:
At the end of your opponent's turn, you can select a number of NECRONS units from your army (excluding units that are within Engagement Range of one or more enemy units). The maximum number of units you can select depends on the battle size, as follows:
Incursion - Up to 1 unit.
Strike Force - Up to 2 units
Onslaught - Up to 3 units
Once you have made your selection, remove those units from the battlefield and place them into Strategic Reserves.

abilities.name: Power Matrix
abilities.effect:
Certain areas of the battlefield are considered to be within your army's Power Matrix, as follows:
- Your deployment zone is always within your army's Power Matrix.
- At the start of any phase, if you control at least half of the objective markers within No Man's Land, until the end of that phase, No Man's Land is within your army's Power Matrix.
- At the start of any phase, if you control at least half of the objective markers within your opponent's deployment zone, until the end of that phase, your opponent's deployment zone is within your army's Power Matrix.
Each time a model in a CRYPTEK or CANOPTEK unit from your army makes an attack, re-roll a Hit roll of 1. If such a unit is wholly within your Power Matrix, you can re-roll the Hit roll instead.

abilities.name: Worthy Foes
abilities.effect: In your Command phase, select one enemy unit. Until the start of your next Command phase, each time an NOBLE, LYCHGUARD or TRIARCH unit from your army makes an attack against that unit, add 1 to the Wound roll.

abilities.name: Technosorcerous Augmentations
abilities.effect:
- Ranged weapons equipped by ^^**Cryptek^^** models from your army have the [ASSAULT] ability.
- In your Shooting phase, each time a ^^**Cryptek^^** unit from your army is selected to shoot, select one of the following abilities: [ANTI‑INFANTRY 3+], [ANTI‑MOUNTED 4+], [ASSAULT], [HEAVY], [IGNORES COVER]. Until the end of the phase, ranged weapons equipped by models in that unit have that ability

abilities.name: Cold Fervour
abilities.effect:
- Add 2 to the Strength characteristic of weapons equipped by ^^**Destroyer Cult^^** models from your army. 
- The first time each turn that a ^^**Destroyer Cult^^** unit from your army makes attacks that destroy a unit or cause it to become Below Half‑strength, after that unit has finished resolving its attacks, until the end of the turn, add 2 to the Strength characteristic of weapons equipped by friendly ^^**Necrons^^** models (excluding ^^**Destroyer Cult, Monster^^** and ^^**Titanic^^** models).

abilities.name: Cosmic Distortion
abilities.effect:
^^**Necrons Monster^^** units from your army have the following ability: 

Distortion Fields (Aura): While an enemy unit is within 6" of this unit, it is unravelling. While an enemy unit is unravelling, each time an attack targets that unit, improve the Armour Penetration characteristic of that attack by 1. 
At the start of each phase, for each ^^**Necrons Monster^^** unit from your army, that unit can suffer 3 mortal wounds. If it does, until the end of the phase, the range of that unit’s Distortion Fields Aura ability is increased to 9".

Restrictions

When mustering your army, each ^^**Necrons Monster^^** unit from your army has the relevant Necrodermal Binding ability shown on the right, and you must increase the points cost of each of those units by the amount shown in the Munitorum Field Manual. If this causes your army to exceed the points limit for the battle you are playing, you cannot include that unit in your army.

abilities.name: Leader
abilities.effect:
While a Bodyguard unit contains a Leader, it is known as an Attached unit and, with the exception of rules that are triggered when units are destroyed (pg 12), it is treated as a single unit for all rules purposes. Each time an attack targets an Attached unit, until the attacking unit has resolved all of its attacks, you must use the Toughness characteristic of the Bodyguard models in that unit, even if a Leader in that unit has a different Toughness characteristic. Each time an attack successfully wounds an Attached unit, that attack cannot be allocated to a Character model in that unit, even if that Character model has lost one or more wounds or has already had attacks allocated to it this phase. As soon as the last Bodyguard model in an Attached unit has been destroyed, any attacks made against that unit that have yet to be allocated can then be allocated to Character models in that unit.

Each time the last model in a Bodyguard unit is destroyed, each CHARACTER unit that is part of that Attached unit becomes a separate unit, with its original Starting Strength. If this happens as the result of an attack, they become separate units after the attacking unit has resolved all of its attacks. 

Each time the last model in a CHARACTER unit that is attached to a Bodyguard unit is destroyed and there is not another CHARACTER unit attached, that Attached unit’s Bodyguard unit becomes a separate unit, with its original Starting Strength. If this happens as the result of an attack, they become separate units after the attacking unit has resolved all of its attacks. 

Each time a unit that is part of an Attached unit is destroyed, it does not have the keywords of any other units that make up that Attached unit (unless it has those keywords on its own datasheet) for the purposes of any rules that would be triggered when that unit is destroyed.

abilities.name: Reanimation Protocols
abilities.effect:
If your Army Faction is NECRONS, at the end of your Command phase, each unit from your army with this ability that is on the battlefield activates its Reanimation Protocols and reanimates D3 wounds. Each time such a unit reanimates a wound:
■ If that unit contains one or more models with fewer than their starting number of wounds remaining, select one of those models; that model regains one lost wound.
■ If all models in that unit have their starting number of wounds, but that unit is not at its Starting Strength, one destroyed model is returned to that unit with one wound remaining.
Once such a unit is at its Starting Strength and all of its models have their starting number of wounds, nothing further happens.

abilities.name: Invulnerable Save
abilities.effect: This model has a 4+ invulnerable save.

abilities.name: Illuminor
abilities.effect: While this model is within 3" of one or more other friendly NECRONS units, this model has the Lone Operative ability.

abilities.name: Mechanical Augmentation (Aura)
abilities.effect: While a friendly NECRONS BATTLELINE unit is within 3" of this model, each time a model in that unit makes an attack, improve the Armour Penetration characteristic of that attack by 1, and each time an attack targets that unit, worsen the Armour Penetration characteristic of that attack by 1.

abilities.name: Atomic Energy Manipulator
abilities.effect: At the end of the Fight phase, if this model destroyed one or more models this phase, until the end of the battle, add 3" to the range of its Mechanical Augmentation ability (to a maximum of 12").

abilities.name: Feel No Pain 4+
abilities.effect: Some models have 'Feel No Pain x+' listed in their abilities. Each time a model with this ability suffers damage and so would lose a wound (including wounds lost due to mortal wounds), roll one D6: if the result is greater than or equal to the number denoted by 'x: that wound is ignored and is not lost. If a model has more than one Feel No Pain ability, you can only use one of those abilities each time that model suffers damage and so would lose a wound.

abilities.name: Leader
abilities.effect:
This model can be attached to the following units:
■ IMMORTALS
■ LYCHGUARD
■ NECRON WARRIORS
You can attach this model to one of the above units even if NEMESOR ZAHNDREKH has already been attached to it. If it is, and that Bodyguard unit is destroyed, the Leader units attached to it become separate units, with their original Starting Strengths.

abilities.name: Ghostwalk Mantle
abilities.effect: While this model is leading a unit, models in that unit have the Fights First ability.

abilities.name: The Vargard’s Duty
abilities.effect: While this model is in the same unit as NEMESOR ZAHNDREKH, CHARACTER models in that unit have the Feel No Pain 4+ ability.

abilities.effect: While a NECRONS CHARACTER model is leading this unit, each time a model in this unit makes an attack, add 1 to the Hit roll.

abilities.name: Hyperphasing
abilities.effect:
At the end of your opponent's turn, you can select a number of NECRONS units from your army (excluding units that are within Engagement Range of one or more enemy units). The maximum number of units you can select depends on the battle size, as follows:
Incursion - Up to 1 unit.
Strike Force - Up to 2 units
Onslaught - Up to 3 units
Once you have made your selection, remove those units from the battlefield and place them into Strategic Reserves.

abilities.name: Power Matrix
abilities.effect:
Certain areas of the battlefield are considered to be within your army's Power Matrix, as follows:
- Your deployment zone is always within your army's Power Matrix.
- At the start of any phase, if you control at least half of the objective markers within No Man's Land, until the end of that phase, No Man's Land is within your army's Power Matrix.
- At the start of any phase, if you control at least half of the objective markers within your opponent's deployment zone, until the end of that phase, your opponent's deployment zone is within your army's Power Matrix.
Each time a model in a CRYPTEK or CANOPTEK unit from your army makes an attack, re-roll a Hit roll of 1. If such a unit is wholly within your Power Matrix, you can re-roll the Hit roll instead.

abilities.name: Worthy Foes
abilities.effect: In your Command phase, select one enemy unit. Until the start of your next Command phase, each time an NOBLE, LYCHGUARD or TRIARCH unit from your army makes an attack against that unit, add 1 to the Wound roll.

abilities.name: Technosorcerous Augmentations
abilities.effect:
- Ranged weapons equipped by ^^**Cryptek^^** models from your army have the [ASSAULT] ability.
- In your Shooting phase, each time a ^^**Cryptek^^** unit from your army is selected to shoot, select one of the following abilities: [ANTI‑INFANTRY 3+], [ANTI‑MOUNTED 4+], [ASSAULT], [HEAVY], [IGNORES COVER]. Until the end of the phase, ranged weapons equipped by models in that unit have that ability

abilities.name: Cold Fervour
abilities.effect:
- Add 2 to the Strength characteristic of weapons equipped by ^^**Destroyer Cult^^** models from your army. 
- The first time each turn that a ^^**Destroyer Cult^^** unit from your army makes attacks that destroy a unit or cause it to become Below Half‑strength, after that unit has finished resolving its attacks, until the end of the turn, add 2 to the Strength characteristic of weapons equipped by friendly ^^**Necrons^^** models (excluding ^^**Destroyer Cult, Monster^^** and ^^**Titanic^^** models).

abilities.name: Cosmic Distortion
abilities.effect:
^^**Necrons Monster^^** units from your army have the following ability: 

Distortion Fields (Aura): While an enemy unit is within 6" of this unit, it is unravelling. While an enemy unit is unravelling, each time an attack targets that unit, improve the Armour Penetration characteristic of that attack by 1. 
At the start of each phase, for each ^^**Necrons Monster^^** unit from your army, that unit can suffer 3 mortal wounds. If it does, until the end of the phase, the range of that unit’s Distortion Fields Aura ability is increased to 9".

Restrictions

When mustering your army, each ^^**Necrons Monster^^** unit from your army has the relevant Necrodermal Binding ability shown on the right, and you must increase the points cost of each of those units by the amount shown in the Munitorum Field Manual. If this causes your army to exceed the points limit for the battle you are playing, you cannot include that unit in your army.

abilities.name: Reanimation Protocols
abilities.effect:
If your Army Faction is NECRONS, at the end of your Command phase, each unit from your army with this ability that is on the battlefield activates its Reanimation Protocols and reanimates D3 wounds. Each time such a unit reanimates a wound:
■ If that unit contains one or more models with fewer than their starting number of wounds remaining, select one of those models; that model regains one lost wound.
■ If all models in that unit have their starting number of wounds, but that unit is not at its Starting Strength, one destroyed model is returned to that unit with one wound remaining.
Once such a unit is at its Starting Strength and all of its models have their starting number of wounds, nothing further happens.

abilities.effect:

■ IMMORTALS
■ NECRON WARRIORS

abilities.name: Adaptive Strategy
abilities.effect: This model's unit is eligible to shoot and declare a charge in a turn in which it Fell Back.

abilities.name: Leader
abilities.effect:
While a Bodyguard unit contains a Leader, it is known as an Attached unit and, with the exception of rules that are triggered when units are destroyed (pg 12), it is treated as a single unit for all rules purposes. Each time an attack targets an Attached unit, until the attacking unit has resolved all of its attacks, you must use the Toughness characteristic of the Bodyguard models in that unit, even if a Leader in that unit has a different Toughness characteristic. Each time an attack successfully wounds an Attached unit, that attack cannot be allocated to a Character model in that unit, even if that Character model has lost one or more wounds or has already had attacks allocated to it this phase. As soon as the last Bodyguard model in an Attached unit has been destroyed, any attacks made against that unit that have yet to be allocated can then be allocated to Character models in that unit.

Each time the last model in a Bodyguard unit is destroyed, each CHARACTER unit that is part of that Attached unit becomes a separate unit, with its original Starting Strength. If this happens as the result of an attack, they become separate units after the attacking unit has resolved all of its attacks. 

Each time the last model in a CHARACTER unit that is attached to a Bodyguard unit is destroyed and there is not another CHARACTER unit attached, that Attached unit’s Bodyguard unit becomes a separate unit, with its original Starting Strength. If this happens as the result of an attack, they become separate units after the attacking unit has resolved all of its attacks. 

Each time a unit that is part of an Attached unit is destroyed, it does not have the keywords of any other units that make up that Attached unit (unless it has those keywords on its own datasheet) for the purposes of any rules that would be triggered when that unit is destroyed.

■ If all models in that unit have their starting number of wounds, but that unit is not at its Starting Strength, one destroyed model is returned to that unit with one wound remaining.
Once such a unit is at its Starting Strength and all of its models have their starting number of wounds, nothing further happens.

Restrictions

When mustering your army, each ^^**Necrons Monster^^** unit from your army has the relevant Necrodermal Binding ability shown on the right, and you must increase the points cost of each of those units by the amount shown in the Munitorum Field Manual. If this causes your army to exceed the points limit for the battle you are playing, you cannot include that unit in your army.

abilities.name: Reanimation Protocols
abilities.effect:
If your Army Faction is NECRONS, at the end of your Command phase, each unit from your army with this ability that is on the battlefield activates its Reanimation Protocols and reanimates D3 wounds. Each time such a unit reanimates a wound:
■ If that unit contains one or more models with fewer than their starting number of wounds remaining, select one of those models; that model regains one lost wound.
■ If all models in that unit have their starting number of wounds, but that unit is not at its Starting Strength, one destroyed model is returned to that unit with one wound remaining.
Once such a unit is at its Starting Strength and all of its models have their starting number of wounds, nothing further happens.

abilities.name: Invulnerable Save
abilities.effect: This model has a 4+ invulnerable save.

abilities.name: Carrier Wave (Aura)
abilities.effect: While a friendly NECRONS unit is within 6" of this model, add 1 to the Objective Control characteristic of models in that unit.

abilities.name: Advanced Quantum Shielding
abilities.effect: Each time an attack targets this model, if the Strength characteristic of that attack is greater than this model’s Toughness characteristic, subtract 1 from the Wound roll.

abilities.name: Resurrection orb
abilities.effect: Once per battle, at the end of any phase, select one friendly NECRONS INFANTRY or NECRONS MOUNTED unit within 6" of the bearer and resurrect that unit. When you do, that unit’s Reanimation Protocols are activated reanimating D6 wounds instead of D3 when doing so. You cannot resurrect more than one unit per turn.

abilities.name: Annihilation Protocol
abilities.effect:
Each time a DESTROYER CULT or FLAYED ONES unit from your army declares a charge, you can re-roll the Charge roll. If one or more targets of that charge are Below Half-strength, add 1 to the charge roll as well.
Each time a DESTROYER CULT unit from your army makes a ranged attack that targets the closest eligible target, add 1 to the Armour Penetration characteristic of that attack.

abilities.name: Command Protocols
abilities.effect: While a NECRONS CHARACTER model is leading this unit, each time a model in this unit makes an attack, add 1 to the Hit roll.

abilities.name: Hyperphasing
abilities.effect:
At the end of your opponent's turn, you can select a number of NECRONS units from your army (excluding units that are within Engagement Range of one or more enemy units). The maximum number of units you can select depends on the battle size, as follows:
Incursion - Up to 1 unit.
Strike Force - Up to 2 units
Onslaught - Up to 3 units
Once you have made your selection, remove those units from the battlefield and place them into Strategic Reserves.

abilities.name: Power Matrix
abilities.effect:
Certain areas of the battlefield are considered to be within your army's Power Matrix, as follows:
- Your deployment zone is always within your army's Power Matrix.
- At the start of any phase, if you control at least half of the objective markers within No Man's Land, until the end of that phase, No Man's Land is within your army's Power Matrix.
- At the start of any phase, if you control at least half of the objective markers within your opponent's deployment zone, until the end of that phase, your opponent's deployment zone is within your army's Power Matrix.
Each time a model in a CRYPTEK or CANOPTEK unit from your army makes an attack, re-roll a Hit roll of 1. If such a unit is wholly within your Power Matrix, you can re-roll the Hit roll instead.

abilities.name: Worthy Foes
abilities.effect: In your Command phase, select one enemy unit. Until the start of your next Command phase, each time an NOBLE, LYCHGUARD or TRIARCH unit from your army makes an attack against that unit, add 1 to the Wound roll.

abilities.name: Technosorcerous Augmentations
abilities.effect:
- Ranged weapons equipped by ^^**Cryptek^^** models from your army have the [ASSAULT] ability.
- In your Shooting phase, each time a ^^**Cryptek^^** unit from your army is selected to shoot, select one of the following abilities: [ANTI‑INFANTRY 3+], [ANTI‑MOUNTED 4+], [ASSAULT], [HEAVY], [IGNORES COVER]. Until the end of the phase, ranged weapons equipped by models in that unit have that ability

abilities.name: Cold Fervour
abilities.effect:
- Add 2 to the Strength characteristic of weapons equipped by ^^**Destroyer Cult^^** models from your army. 
- The first time each turn that a ^^**Destroyer Cult^^** unit from your army makes attacks that destroy a unit or cause it to become Below Half‑strength, after that unit has finished resolving its attacks, until the end of the turn, add 2 to the Strength characteristic of weapons equipped by friendly ^^**Necrons^^** models (excluding ^^**Destroyer Cult, Monster^^** and ^^**Titanic^^** models).

abilities.name: Leader
abilities.effect:
While a Bodyguard unit contains a Leader, it is known as an Attached unit and, with the exception of rules that are triggered when units are destroyed (pg 12), it is treated as a single unit for all rules purposes. Each time an attack targets an Attached unit, until the attacking unit has resolved all of its attacks, you must use the Toughness characteristic of the Bodyguard models in that unit, even if a Leader in that unit has a different Toughness characteristic. Each time an attack successfully wounds an Attached unit, that attack cannot be allocated to a Character model in that unit, even if that Character model has lost one or more wounds or has already had attacks allocated to it this phase. As soon as the last Bodyguard model in an Attached unit has been destroyed, any attacks made against that unit that have yet to be allocated can then be allocated to Character models in that unit.

Each time the last model in a Bodyguard unit is destroyed, each CHARACTER unit that is part of that Attached unit becomes a separate unit, with its original Starting Strength. If this happens as the result of an attack, they become separate units after the attacking unit has resolved all of its attacks. 

Each time the last model in a CHARACTER unit that is attached to a Bodyguard unit is destroyed and there is not another CHARACTER unit attached, that Attached unit’s Bodyguard unit becomes a separate unit, with its original Starting Strength. If this happens as the result of an attack, they become separate units after the attacking unit has resolved all of its attacks. 

Each time a unit that is part of an Attached unit is destroyed, it does not have the keywords of any other units that make up that Attached unit (unless it has those keywords on its own datasheet) for the purposes of any rules that would be triggered when that unit is destroyed.

■ If all models in that unit have their starting number of wounds, but that unit is not at its Starting Strength, one destroyed model is returned to that unit with one wound remaining.
Once such a unit is at its Starting Strength and all of its models have their starting number of wounds, nothing further happens.
